name: Chicken a La Avacado
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over low heat.
2. Cook chicken 3 oz each side for about 5 minutes until cooked through.
3. Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, sauté capers for 1 minute.
5. Add lemon juice and parsley to the skillet and cook for another minute.
6. Place lemon juice and caper mixture over each chicken breast.
7. Serve with avocado slices fanned on top and rice.
